  "content": "### Statistics\n\nPersonal resources\n\nYour  online  / available QPUs\n\n2\n\n/5\n\nRemaining execution time (sec)\n\n\\---\n\nTime refresh in\n\n06 days\n\nAPI token expiration in\n\n\\-2 days\n\nat 2026-07-04 16:03:01\n\nJupyter server running for\n\n\\---\n\nTasks statistics\n\nYour last task submitted\n\n\\---\n\nTasks in queue waiting for execution\n\n\\---\n\nWaiting time of last  finished  task\n\n\\---\n\nExecuting time of last  finished  task\n\n\\---\n\n### Available QPUs\n\n# Baihua\n\n![](data:image/png;base64,)7\n\nStatus\n\nOnline\n\nQueue\n\n0\n\nQubits\n\n156\n\nCouplers\n\n182\n\nMedian 1Q error\n\n1.0e-3\n\nMedian 2Q error\n\n1.7e-2\n\n# Dongling\n\n![](data:image/png;base64,)2\n\nStatus\n\nOnline\n\nQueue\n\n0\n\nQubits\n\n84\n\nCouplers\n\n113\n\nMedian 1Q error\n\n3.0e-3\n\nMedian 2Q error\n\n1.8e-2\n\n# Shenglian\n\n![](data:image/png;base64,)15\n\nStatus\n\nCalibrating\n\nQueue\n\n\\---\n\nQubits\n\n84\n\nCouplers\n\n113\n\nMedian 1Q error\n\n1.0e-3\n\nMedian 2Q error\n\n9.0e-3\n\n# Hongluo\n\n![](data:image/png;base64,)17\n\nStatus\n\nCalibrating\n\nQueue\n\n\\---\n\nQubits\n\n84\n\nCouplers\n\n113\n\nMedian 1Q error\n\n6.0e-4\n\nMedian 2Q error\n\n4.7e-2\n\n# Ling\n\n![](data:image/png;base64,)21\n\nStatus\n\nCalibrating\n\nQueue\n\n\\---\n\nQubits\n\n112\n\nCouplers\n\n195\n\nMedian 1Q error\n\n4.5e-3\n\nMedian 2Q error\n\n3.6e-2"
